title: 2023 Singapore reported median total compensation by international work experience
summary: Aggregate results from Design Pay Asia 2022-23 survey data, filtered exactly to Country = Singapore and Currency you draw your salary in = SGD (n=223). Respondents reporting no international work experience were n=150 with median total compensation of S$70,100. Respondents reporting international work experience were n=73 with a median of S$130,000. These are respondent medians, not population estimates.
methodology: The authoritative worksheet was filtered using exact matches Country = Singapore and Currency you draw your salary in = SGD, leaving n=223. One Singapore response reported in USD was excluded and no currency conversion was applied. Values are self-reported total compensation medians. Published cohorts meet the minimum n=10 threshold, and no respondent-level data is exposed.
